purpose: raw#12 pre-registered analytic ceiling for Mk.IX L_IX path 4-tuple lift. Frozen 2026-04-25, no post-hoc tuning. Real measurement requires GPU forward (raw#9 explicit exempt + r9-equivalent launch).
L_IX_definition: L_IX = T - V_struct - V_sync - V_RG + lambda * I_irr

V1.mechanism: lambda * I_irr direct maximization → partition spectral resistance lower bound
V1.PASS_condition: lambda >= lambda_critical (frozen value undetermined, requires fp measurement)

V2.mechanism: V_sync minimization → cross-token/cross-language coherence (indirect EN↔KO mirror)
V2.redundancy_concern: V_sync may overlap with PAPO mechanism — fine-tune-time application stronger than runtime steering, but PASS not guaranteed

V3.mechanism: V_RG minimization → permutation-invariant manifold (both preserve and destruct perms move closer to G)
V3.fundamental_blocker: V3 surrogate (Gram Frobenius perturbation ratio) is reduction-invariant and direction-inverted at substrate level (§9.3 FALSIFIED). V_RG does NOT fix the metric bug — both numerator and denominator shrink, ratio stays near 1.0.

composite_ceiling_verdict: PARTIAL — Mk.IX L_IX path는 V1/V2 부분 lift 후보지만 V3 PASS 도달 본질적 불가능 (metric bug). 4-tuple joint PASS는 V3 metric redesign이 선행되어야 도달 가능.
critical_blocker: V3 surrogate metric (Gram Frob perturbation ratio) — Mk.IX architecture path로는 해결 불가. metric redesign (e.g., ground-truth EN↔KO pair-wise cosine, semantic-block substitution test) 또는 V3를 4-tuple에서 제거하는 spec revision 필요.
next_cycle_priority: V3 metric redesign (highest priority — 4-tuple PASS critical blocker)
Multi-axis PAPO extension (V2 +0.036 gap close, BASE-substrate reachable)
Mk.X T10-13 ossification cycle (별도 path, 본 cycle scope 외)
L_IX lambda fp measurement (V1 PASS 조건 determination, GPU 필요)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — 'expected ceiling' analytic heuristics 명시, 실측 NOT performed 명시, real L_IX-trained trajectory measurement is GPU-bound and deferred
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — ceiling values frozen 2026-04-25, post-hoc tuning prohibited, fp-measurement-based revisions allowed only with old_ceiling preserved

raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (this spec doc + sensitivity argument) → impl (this state SSOT + commit) → fixpoint marker

frozen_predicate: Per-axis ceiling ranges and verdicts are not modifiable post-hoc. Real measurement that falls within ceiling = spec confirmed. Real measurement outside ceiling = spec revision with old_ceiling preserved.
